title: Create: Compat BetterEnd & BetterNether
description: This Minecraft datapack connects the Create mod with the BetterEnd and BetterNether mods by adding recipes for stripping logs.
body: This Minecraft datapack connects the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) with the [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) and [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) by adding recipes for stripping logs. It lets players use machines from the Create mod to strip logs from the unique wood types found in the BetterEnd and BetterNether dimensions. For now, it only includes this log stripping feature, making it easier to work with these special woods
